overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player exiting a building onto a luxury rooftop terrace during golden hour, with views of a coastal city and roller coaster, then entering a derelict abandoned interior through a collapsed wall. The sequence transitions from bright natural sunlight to dimly lit, graffiti-covered rooms with neon lighting.

events.description: metal door opens revealing bright rooftop terrace and city skyline
transition from dim green interior lighting to bright golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: opening door and stepping out onto the rooftop terrace

entered.detail: heavy metal door with bright light gap opening to the terrace
overhead wooden beam structure casting shadows on the deck
large amusement park roller coaster visible in the distance against the skyline
modern outdoor kitchen counter with blue LED accent lighting
wooden decking covering the rooftop surface

segments.scene_description: The scene begins with a first-person view opening a metal door from a dim interior, transitioning onto a wooden rooftop terrace bathed in golden hour sunlight. The camera moves forward under a wooden pergola structure, revealing a modern outdoor kitchen island to the left and a distant city skyline featuring a prominent roller coaster.

events.description: turning left along the terrace edge toward the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace perimeter, observing the city views and coastal scenery

entered.detail: stacked sandbags and construction materials near the terrace edge
tall palm trees in planters along the terrace perimeter
coastal waterway with distant buildings across the bay
tall curved modern apartment complex adjacent to the terrace

segments.scene_description: Moving along the open rooftop terrace, the camera passes under the wooden pergola structure with full sky visibility. The scene features palm trees, sandbag piles, and outdoor furniture, with the roller coaster now visible to the left and a curved apartment building rising on the right. The waterfront and distant cityscape are visible in the background.

events.description: entering damaged building structure through collapsed concrete wall
transition from bright sunlight to dim orange-lit interior with rubble

agents.ego_description: crouching slightly to enter the damaged structure and navigate through rubble

entered.detail: heavily damaged concrete wall with exposed rebar and broken sections
pile of concrete debris and broken materials blocking the path
wall covered in colorful spray paint graffiti tags
metal door covered in orange and black graffiti markings
piles of garbage bags and discarded waste along the walls

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and enters a severely damaged section of the building through a collapsed concrete wall, transitioning from the bright terrace to a dark, rubble-filled corridor. The space features extensive graffiti, piles of trash bags, and a partially collapsed ceiling with debris scattered across a red carpeted floor.

events.description: moving from narrow rubble corridor into larger living room area
blue neon light becomes visible illuminating the dark room interior

agents.ego_description: navigating through the abandoned rooms, examining the decayed interior and debris

entered.detail: large open living space with scattered furniture and debris
broken ceiling fan hanging from the damaged ceiling
floor-to-ceiling windows with yellow-tinted glass overlooking outside
vertical blue neon tube light mounted on the wall
dark colored sofa with debris on it
glass coffee table in the center of the room

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the abandoned structure, the camera enters a larger living room area with broken furniture, scattered debris, and damaged ceiling fixtures. The lighting shifts to a moody atmosphere with blue neon accent lighting on the right wall and warm light filtering through large yellow-tinted windows, revealing the extent of the abandonment and decay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched luxury rooftop terrace into the decaying, neon-lit ruins of an abandoned interior. It begins as a metal door opens from a dim room onto a wooden terrace bathed in golden hour sunlight, moving under a pergola past a modern kitchen island toward a distant city skyline and a prominent roller coaster. As the camera glides across the open deck, the view expands to include palm trees and sandbags against a backdrop of a curved apartment building and the coastal waterfront. The scene then shifts abruptly as the camera passes through a collapsed concrete wall, transitioning from the bright exterior into a dark, rubble-strewn corridor filled with graffiti and trash. Finally, the movement leads deeper into a derelict living room where the natural light fades, replaced by a moody atmosphere of blue neon accents and warm glows filtering through yellow-tinted windows.
